cards.subtitle: xs 8 → 4xl 34. Deliberately tiny: the UI reads like printed ephemera.

templates.name: Albescent — Faction Kit
templates.description: Vellum-correspondence faction surfaces: pure-white sacred-society pages with Cormorant Garamond italic, a surveyor's-mark sigil, a grayscale 'bear witness' rating, and a quiet logbook feed. Always-lig

templates.name: S.N.I.D.E. — Faction Kit
templates.description: Cut-and-paste ransom/xerox-punk faction surfaces: ransom task cards, faction page, dispatch board, praxis, join — built on World Zero tokens.

templates.name: Singularity — Faction Kit
templates.description: Terminal-printout faction surfaces: phosphor-on-black faction page, praxis register, sealed-praxis read view + Cast-Signal consensus vote, signal-dispatch feed. Always-dark terminal archetype on World

templates.name: The Ephemerists — Faction Kit
templates.description: Illuminated-codex faction (rebrand of the Journeymen): the discordant map, faction page, ephemeris updates, sealed praxes — built on World Zero tokens.

templates.name: The Everymen — Faction Kit
templates.description: Union/victory-poster faction surfaces: task cards, faction page, updates, join, praxis — built on World Zero tokens.

templates.name: UA — Faction Kit
templates.description: The University of Asthmatics, repainted as a gilt art-academy: heraldic-crest task cards, the Salon faction page, an acquisition praxis read with a 1–5 Critique, and a Salon-submission edit form. Burn

templates.name: Warriors of Whimsy — Faction Kit
templates.description: The whimsy.exe pink computer-witch desktop faction: quest board, updates feed, .exe windows, asset kit — built on World Zero tokens.
